title: EssentialsX Discord
description: The Discord chat integration module for EssentialsX. (requires main module)
body:
**EssentialsX Discord** provides a lightweight and easy-to-use bridge between Discord and Minecraft. It includes the following features:
- Two-way bridging of in-game chat with Discord channels (including custom channels from other plugins!)
- Discord messages for in-game events (join/leave/death/mutes)
- Server console relay to a Discord channel
- Discord slash commands - private messaging with `/msg`, listing online players with `/list` and executing console commands with `/execute` (all controllable using Discord permissions)

For information on how to set up this module, see the [EssentialsX Discord tutorial](https://essentialsx.net/wiki/Discord-Tutorial.html)!

You need a matching version of the [main EssentialsX module](https://modrinth.com/plugin/essentialsx) to use this addon module, as well as [Vault](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/vault.34315/) and [LuckPerms](https://modrinth.com/plugin/luckperms) to detect players' prefixes, suffixes and groups. EssentialsX Discord also optionally supports injecting placeholders from [PlaceholderAPI](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/placeholderapi.6245/) into messages sent to Discord.
